nodes.name: WhatsApp Webhook
nodes.notes: Meta Cloud API webhook. Configure the same URL + verify token in Meta App Dashboard → WhatsApp → Configuration. GET verification is handled by the platform endpoint /api/webhooks/whatsapp (M5) OR by a second webhook node with responseMode. TODO: attach credentials.

parameters.query: insert into whatsapp_messages_log (phone, direction, message_type, content) values ($1, 'inbound', $2, $3::jsonb);

nodes.name: Log Inbound
nodes.notes: TODO: attach Supabase Postgres credentials (connection string from Supabase → Settings → Database).

parameters.query: insert into whatsapp_sessions (phone, state, context) values ($1, 'idle', '{}'::jsonb) on conflict (phone) do update set last_message_at = now() returning id, phone, state, context, customer_id;

nodes.name: Get/Create Session
nodes.notes: alwaysOutputData:true so the not-found branch is routable.

nodes.name: State Router
nodes.notes: Fallback output = unknown state → send main menu.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $('Extract Message').item.json.phone, type: 'interactive', interactive: { type: 'list', header: { type: 'text', text: 'Aeden Fresh 🥗' }, body: { text: 'Fresh, delivered daily. What would you like to do?' }, action: { button: 'Menu', sections: [{ title: 'Shop', rows: [ { id: 'menu_build', title: 'Build a Salad' }, { id: 'menu_baskets', title: 'Curated Baskets' }, { id: 'menu_subs', title: 'My Subscriptions' }, { id: 'menu_track', title: 'Track Order' } ] }] } } }) }}

nodes.name: Send Main Menu
nodes.notes: Header auth credential: Authorization: Bearer {{WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN}}. After sending, Update Session sets state='browsing'.

nodes.name: Fetch Catalogue
nodes.notes: browsing + 'Build a Salad' → fetch categories, send bases list, set state='customising', context={step:'base',selections:{}}. Store resolution: if context.store_id missing, first ask for pincode then GET /api/stores/resolve.

nodes.name: Advance Builder Step
nodes.notes: On nextStep='summary': compute price/nutrition totals from catalogue, send summary + [Subscribe | Order Once | Edit] buttons, set state='cart'. Multi-select categories (topping/addon) also offer a 'Done ✓' row to advance early.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: 'whatsapp', phone: $json.phone, option_ids: Object.values($json.context.selections).flat(), address_id: $json.context.address_id, delivery_slot_id: $json.context.slot_id, store_id: $json.context.store_id }) }}

nodes.name: Create Order (Checkout API)
nodes.notes: CART state: after address (saved list or shared location → resolve store) + slot chosen. Response contains razorpay payment link → send to customer, set state='awaiting_payment'. M3 endpoint.

parameters.query: update whatsapp_sessions set state = $2, context = $3::jsonb, last_message_at = now() where phone = $1;

nodes.name: Update Session
nodes.notes: Every branch ends here: persist new state + context, then Log Outbound.

parameters.query: insert into whatsapp_messages_log (phone, direction, message_type, content) values ($1, 'outbound', $2, $3::jsonb);

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $('Extract Message').item.json.phone, type: 'text', text: { body: "Sorry, I didn't get that 🙈 — here's the menu again." } }) }}

nodes.name: Fallback Reply
nodes.notes: Unrecognised input → apology + re-send main menu (connect to Send Main Menu).
